summary: All requested features verified working: 1) Preset dropdown shows ONLY work type names (no prices), 2) Edit mode in Määrälaskenta has 'Tyyppi' dropdown for changing preset type, 3) Changing preset updates label, price, and unit correctly, 4) Copy button works and copied measurement has Tyyppi dropdown
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 VERIFIED: ToolPresetSelector.js lines 193-201 only show preset.name without prices
Feature 2 VERIFIED: TakeoffPanel.js lines 188-241 has 'Tyyppi' dropdown in edit mode with ALL_PRESETS options
Feature 3 VERIFIED: Lines 204-234 properly reset all special flags and apply new preset's label, price, unit, and flags
Feature 4 VERIFIED: Copy button creates new measurement with '(kopio)' suffix, editable with Tyyppi dropdown
Code structure is clean with proper data separation between ToolPresetSelector and TakeoffPanel preset definitions
seed_data_creation: Created test measurement using PDF upload + rectangle tool + double-click to complete
context_for_next_testing_agent: App requires: 1) PDF file upload via 'Avaa PDF', 2) Scale calibration via 'Ei asetettu' button, 3) Tool selection + preset selection from dropdown (no prices shown), 4) First click + double-click to create rectangle measurement. Measurements appear in right panel (Määrälaskenta tab). Edit button (pencil icon) opens edit mode with Tyyppi dropdown for changing preset type.

tests_executed.details: Verified ToolPresetSelector shows only preset names like 'Kipsikatto tasoitus ja maalaus' without prices
Clicking edit (pencil) shows 'Tyyppi' label with dropdown containing all preset options
Changed from 'Kipsikatto tasoitus ja maalaus' (20€) to 'AK huoltomaalaus' (10€) - label and price updated correctly
Copy created new measurement with '(kopio)' suffix, count went from 1 to 2
Copied measurement in edit mode shows Tyyppi dropdown with all presets
